title: Ubiquiti Pro Bullet Enhancer - External illumination for G6 Pro Bullet and AI Pro, white
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-Pro-Bullet-Enhancer-W is an IPX5 rated accessory designed to enhance cameras with up to 60m IR illumination (40m for AI Pro), 600 lumen LED floodlight , speaker and a radar motion detector with a detection range of up to 20m for people and 35m for vehicles UVC-G6-Pro-Bullet UVC-AI-Pro
specsSearch: Camera Illumination Hybrid IR / White light Illumination range [m] 60 Connectors and Interfaces Audio Speaker Power Max. power consumption [W] 15 Power via connector/terminal 5V / 3A
